description: Vulnerability management including scanning, patch management, penetration testing, and remediation tracking with defined SLAs.

subcriteria.name: vulnerability_scanning
subcriteria.reference_text: Active vulnerability scanning of systems and dependencies. Automated scanning tools configured and running regularly.

subcriteria.name: patch_management
subcriteria.reference_text: Patch management process with defined SLAs by severity. Critical vulnerabilities patched within 48 hours, high within 7 days, etc.

subcriteria.name: remediation_tracking
subcriteria.reference_text: Remediation tracking with status updates. Open vulnerabilities tracked to closure. Remediation progress visible in dashboard or tracking tool.

subcriteria.name: penetration_testing
subcriteria.reference_text: Annual or semi-annual penetration testing by third party. Report and remediation plan from most recent pen test.

mismatch_signals.reason: Dependency file without scan results is not vulnerability management evidence.
Scan results older than 6 months do not demonstrate active vulnerability management.
